_comment: The .html-parameter rule, reviewed with --allow-experiments. Only a plain .html parameter to an Experiment API joins the WebExtension tree: ui is handed content/uipage.html, so it + its content/uipage.js script are CHECKED (browser.bogusApi IS flagged at uipage.js:3). The .js/.xhtml parameters to wl and mystery (content/legacy-entry.js, content/maybe.js) and the experiment implementation files (experiments/*/parent.js, content/legacy-core.js) are NOT in the WebExtension tree -> NOT validated (their bogus/core APIs are not flagged). Control: browser.controlBogus in the WebExtension background.js IS flagged.
